name: Anastasia
description: __Height:__ 165 cm __Hometown:__ Hokkaido Prefecture, Japan Anastasia, nick-named "Anya" is a half-Russian girl who originally lived in Russia before moving to Japan. She is fluent in Russian and often sprinkles Russian phrases into her speech. Anastasia's biggest hobby is stargazing and she hopes to one day discover an asteroid. Due to her love of astronomy and stargazing, Anya's stage costumes and idol image are heavily influenced by stars. Her image is also heavily influenced by winter, snow,

name: Anpu
description: Anpu shows up a couple of times and is also part of the “everyone else loves me so why doesn’t Saiki” brigade. After being saved by Kusuo, he starts to visit his house to make Kusuo pet him. He once got Kusuo (disguised as Sai) to aid him in trying to woo a female cat Pushi. Later on, Kusuo pets him after Anpu saved him from a chasing cockroach. (Source: Saiki Kusuo no Psi Nan Wikia)

The Disastrous Life of Saiki K. Season 2

name: Darjeeling
description: One of the "Noble Sisters" from St. Gloriana's Girls Academy. She is a third year. Her role is a commander in the Churchill tank. As the commanding officer at St. Gloriana, she leads the entire Panzer team. Her characteristic is the way she speaks in a high-handed manner. She is calm, chivalrous, and maintains her composure in and out of the field. Her motto is "No matter how fast we go, or no matter how many hits we take, I will never spill my tea." She is seen most of the time drinking Darjeel

name: Haruno Akiyama
description: **Height:** 165 cm (5′5″) **Camera:** Smartphone A 4-koma manga artist, using the pen name "Akino", and was a few steps shy of becoming a full-blown NEET. Lives with her grandmother who runs a cheap sweets shop.

name: Luca
description: Luca is the leader of a band of prostitutes at Albion. Red-haired and fiercely loyal to her charges, she is romantically linked to the Holy Iron Chain Knight Jerome. When Jerome gave her a necklace of pearls, she divided them evenly among her girls, believing that they could only survive the hysteria of the heretic hunts by eliminating any cause for jealousy. description: Luxion was originally a cash in-game shop item in the original Otome Game, but now, he's the deuteragonist of the story, an important supporting player of the major events of the series.

name: Maho Nishizumi
description: **Height:** 163 cm (5'4") **Home Town:** Kumamoto City, Kunamoto Prefecture Maho Nishizumi is the older sister of [Miho Nishizumi](https://anilist.co/character/62939/Miho-Nishizumi) and daughter of [Shiho Nishizumi](https://anilist.co/character/74699/Shiho-Nishizumi). Maho is a third year student at Kuromorimine Girls Academy, overall tank commander Kuromorimine's Sensha-dō team, and the heiress to the Nishizumi family's style of Sensha-dō. name: Mika
description: In addition to being the overall commander for Jatkosota High School's Sensha-dō team, she commands a BT-42. She is seen with the kantele, a traditional Finnish instrument and also a väinämöinen hat. Personality-wise, she is care-free, while also philosophical in nature as she often quotes proverbs. In battle, she is untroubled and remains calm.

name: Naoya Teshigawara
description: Teshigawara is the class' "mood maker". He is usually superficial in nature. He is shown to have a sympathetic side, since he was the first one to talk to Kouichi, who was still not used to the surroundings.

name: Nero
description: [Monica](https://anilist.co/character/249404)'s familiar. Although it has the appearance of a black cat, it can understand and speak human language. When Monica looks distressed, it will let her touch its paws to soothe her. It has trouble remembering the names of humans other than Monica. However, it likes reading novels written by humans, and is a big fan of the novelist Dustin Gunther.

name: Paulie
description: __Height:__ 195cm (6'5") __Affiliations:__ Galley-La Company Paulie is one of the five Dock One foremen, specializing in rigging, knots, and masts. He became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the end of the Water 7 Arc and the beginning of the Enies Lobby Arc. Paulie is often seen with a cigar in his mouth. His denim jacket has a flame detail, many of his cigars strapped to it (in a similar fashion to Smoker), and a big "1" printed on its back, most likely referring to Dock 1. ~!Later on,

name: Riki Naoe
description: __Height:__ 166 cm Riki is the protagonist of Little Busters! He is a member of the Little Busters, and of them, he is seen as the only one that is straightforward and has common sense. name: Rita Ainsworth
description: Rita was Mashiro's roommate and handler when Mashiro was in England. Despite her being the same age as Sorata and Mashiro, she has a better figure. She was jealous of Mashiro's art talent, and so advised Mashiro to draw manga, but later she regrets this and comes to Japan to bring Mashiro back to England. name: Shouko Kirishima
description: Shouko Kirishima is the childhood friend of Yuuji Sakamoto. She is the top student in her level and the class representative for class A. In the story, she is portrayed as a soft-spoken, but highly assertive and intelligent girl. In the novel, her dialog always starts with ellipses. She is described as elegantly beautiful and very popular like a typical Yamato Nadeshiko, but yet has no boyfriend, which initially created the impression to others that she is a lesbian. name: Sun Seto
description: Sun is the daughter of mermaid Yakuza Seto Group's boss, Seto Gozaburo. She is a firm believer in the chivalrous spirit of mermaids, and is devoted to her role as Nagasumi's wife. Not yet being an adult, Sun is not able to completely maintain her human form, and her legs revert to a tail whenever she comes into contact with water. (Source: Wikipedia) Sun is well known in her school due to her figure, tall height, and model like appearance.

name: The Major
description: A first Lieutenant of SS in WWII, The Major was ordered by Hitler to lead the project of creating an army of Nazi vampires. Upon the defeat brought by Alucard and Walter in Poland, The Major and his officers escaped to South America. The original purpose of the Vampire project was to ensure Germany victory in WWII, but The Major now has his own agenda, preaching of endless war and destruction, and seems to pay no heed to who will be victorious. name: Yoo-Sung Shin
description: Shin Yoosung is one of Kim Dokja's and Yoo Joonghyuk's party members, and Kim Dokja's sponsored Incarnation. She is a character from the original Ways of Survival, and the child whose 41st round adult self appeared in Main Scenario 5 as the Disaster of Floods.
